name: forest-onboarding
description: Onboard onto Forest Admin headlessly (Standalone-first): log in, create a project from your database or a zero-DB demo, and boot the dev agent to a working back-office on your own machine. The dev flow is bounded — it stops at that milestone, then offers layout, customizations, production deploy and team invites as opt-in extensions. Orchestrated end-to-end from the CLI, no UI.
